title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: 1. **`smoke-happy-login` try/finally move** Guidance: wrap *all mutating steps* (setup SQL onward) in one `try/finally`, and make cleanup idempotent. Keep snapshot/read-only discovery before `try`. Hidden pitfall: if cleanup predicates are broad (`title='Happy API smoke task'`), a failed run can delete unrelated rows. Prefer cleanup keyed by a per-run marker in metadata. Refs: [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js) 2. **`updatedAt` stale-token protection** Guidance: track in-memory token timestamp and apply shared tokens only when `incoming.updatedAt > current.updatedAt` (not just token inequality). Hidden pitfall: equal timestamps can happen; define deterministic tie-break (e.g., keep current on equal) to avoid token flip-flop across tabs. Refs: [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/public/happy/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js), [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js) 3. **Fallback lock TTL renewal** Guidance: when using localStorage lock fallback, start a heartbeat interval that extends `expiresAt` while refresh is active; stop it in `finally`; only extend if `ownerId` still matches. Hidden pitfall: background-tab timer throttling can still let lock expire; keep the post-lock guard (`syncFromSharedTokens` + compare seen tokens) so duplicate refreshes are harmless if they happen. Refs: [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/public/happy/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js), [happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js) 4. **Test additions** Guidance: add explicit tests for (a) no `navigator.locks` path with long refresh duration, and (b) stale shared-token ignored vs newer shared-token applied. Hidden pitfall: timing tests will be flaky with real clocks; use controlled `Date.now`/timers and deterministic async sequencing. Refs: [test-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js)
